name: Scorch-Drift Bot
oracle_text: Alt-Mode (Racing Form) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 3/1 and it gains trample. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Shift gears, or be left in the dust.
design_notes: Designed for the WR Rapid Strike archetype, this creature offers an offensive morphology shift via Alt-Mode. It allows players to choose between a stable 2/2 BotBot and a more aggressive 3/1 vehicle with trample, providing tactical depth in combat. This differs from Dash-Gear Bot by focusing on raw impact (trample) rather than speed (haste).
